content_fingerprint: openai publishes codex settings guide as agent workflow documentation push continues openai released configuration guidance for its codex coding agent covering personalization detail level and permissions controls the same week the company published a technical deep dive into the websocket based architecture powering codex s agent loop openai has published a dedicated settings guide for codex its autonomous coding agent walking users through how to configure personalization preferences output detail levels and team level permissions the guide posted to the openai academy on april 23 2026 is ai
